title: Remote connect-readiness gate + cancel a not-started queued job
description: Two remote-engine UX bugs (MPI-64 testing): premature 'Connected' before the preview-WS is ready -> queued jobs hang in STARTING; and Stop can't clear a STARTING job with no prompt_id. Plus connecting/disconnecting feedback in the hero card + status bar. See brief.md.
activeSessionTitle: MPI-73 session 1 — remote connect-readiness gate + cancel a never-started queued job + connect/disconnect feedback + Cue-disable
